meta.title: Your Desk Persona
meta.description: Upload a photo of your desk and see if it reads you the way you read yourself

home.lead2: The little workhorse on your desk might know you better than you think.
home.ctaDesc1: Snap your desk. Hand it to Qwen.
home.ctaDesc2: See if its read on you matches yours.
home.footerHint: Your everyday desk is perfect — no staging needed

upload.title: Snap your desk
upload.subtitle: No staging — real beats polished. Your desk buddy and Qwen will handle the rest.
upload.dropHint: From gallery, or snap your desk now
upload.imageError: Couldn't process that image — try another

thinkingTexts: Qwen is burning the midnight oil…
Your desk buddy is peeking over the keyboard
Don't close yet — still guessing your age
Scanning your desktop again and again
That mug is giving something away…
Reading every item on your desk

timeout.title: Qwen worked overtime
timeout.message: Photo might be too large, or the network is slow.
timeout.hint: Try a smaller desk photo, or come back later.

failed.title: Desk buddy is confused today
failed.message: Couldn't quite read your desk — no panic.
failed.hint: Usually one more try works; otherwise swap the photo.

report.loading: Your desk is folding the letter…
report.title: You, through your desk's eyes
report.matchFallback: {mbti} × {zodiac} — does your desk's read feel right?
report.shareHint: Swipe to the cert card to preview and save a share image

cards.mbtiSubtitle: Desk edition · not a clinical test
cards.zodiacSubtitle: Matched to desk vibes · not your birthday sign

share.title: Your Desk Persona
share.qrTitle: Scan to test — let your desk talk
share.saveWeChatHint: Save failed? Tap ··· → Open in browser, then save
share.shareHint: Save the cert card to share
share.generateError: Couldn't generate share image — try again

recommend.title: Desk essentials
recommend.subtitle: Stuff your desk letter hinted at — picked for you here.
